headline: Kroger appoints former Walmart U.S. CEO Gregory S. Foran as its new Chief Executive Officer, effective February 10, 2026.
investor_impact: The appointment of Gregory Foran is a significant positive catalyst, bringing a highly respected retail veteran with a proven track record at Walmart U.S. to lead Kroger. Investors will likely view his deep operational and grocery expertise as a strong driver for improved execution and competitive positioning.
key_figures: 200% of base salary (Target annual cash incentive)
Ronald Sargent (Current interim CEO, continuing as Chairman)
